name: Android Web App
description: Ready-to-use Android Studio project for a simple web app with built-in forward, back, and home controls.

name: RSS Reader Advanced
description: RSS Reader Advanced is a clean, modern Android RSS/Atom feed reader built as a ready-to-use Android Studio project. It lets you subscribe to any number of feeds, organize them as sources, browse all articles in one place, and keep your favorite items for later.
